title: NoLimitEnchantments
description: No limit for your item/armor enchantments
body:
# NoLimitEnchants - No limit to enchant your items!

I was getting really frustrated with vanilla Minecraft's enchantment limits... like seriously, why can't I have Fortune 255 on my pickaxe? Or Sharpness 100 on my sword? It just felt so restrictive, you know?

That's when I decided to create **NoLimitEnchants** - a plugin that completely removes those annoying enchantment level caps and lets you go crazy with your gear!

## What does it do?
- **Removes ALL enchantment level limits** - Want Fortune 255? Go for it!
- **Maximum level is now 255** for every single enchantment
- **Works with anvils** - Combine enchanted books beyond normal limits
- **Easy commands** with full tab completion (because who remembers all enchantment names?)
- **Permissions system** so you can control who gets to use it

## Commands
- `/nenchant <enchantment> <level>` - Apply any enchantment up to level 255
- `/nenchantlist` - See what enchantments are on your current item

## Examples
- `/nenchant fortune 255` - Fortune 255 pickaxe = instant mining basically
- `/nenchant sharpness 100` - One-shot almost anything
- `/nenchant efficiency 255` - Trees disappear in milliseconds

## Installation
Just drop the JAR in your plugins folder and restart. Works with Paper, Spigot, and most other Bukkit-based servers.

## Compatibility
- ✅ Minecraft 1.21 to 1.21.7
- ✅ Paper/Spigot
- ✅ All major enchantments supported
- ✅ Full tab completion

## Permissions
- `nolimitenchants.enchant` - Use the enchant command
- `nolimitenchants.list` - Use the list command
- `nolimitenchants.*` - All permissions

Hope you guys enjoy this as much as I do! Let me know if you run into any issues or have suggestions for improvements.
